title: Spec Reviews
description: Design reviews of specification documents. Each review targets one spec, runs a pre-implementation review pass (ideally via independent fresh-context reviewer), and carries scope/method/status. A spec-review blocks implementation-spec drafting until 'clean'.

target.description: Path to the spec doc being reviewed

target_revision.description: Git SHA or version at which the review was conducted

reviewer.description: Agent name or role performing the review

scope.description: Sections or concerns of the target in scope for this review

method.description: How the review is conducted — e.g. 'fresh-context independent reviewer', 'adversarial pre-mortem', 'self-review'

clean.description: True when every finding has a terminal state (resolved/wontfix/duplicate)

x-lifecycle.note: AJV draft-07 cannot enforce transition validity; this block is metadata for future framework-level state-machine validation (FGAP-005).
